hero.headline:
Your Dream Landscape, Designed &
Built to Last
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should inspire you every time you step outside. For over 30 years, Emerald Gardens has been transforming yards across Southeast Louisiana into stunning, personalized landscapes. We handle design, installation, and maintenance so you simply enjoy the view.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Landscape Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> From Design to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Stop imagining the perfect outdoor space and start living in it. From concept sketches to weekly upkeep, our four-licensed team handles every detail so you can enjoy your property year-round.

cards.title: Landscape Design
cards.description: Free onsite consultations with state-of-the-art 3D design technology, color renderings, and detailed itemized proposals that bring your vision to life before a single plant goes in the ground.

cards.title: Landscape Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of plants, trees, shrubs, sod, flower beds, and hardscape elements. Every project is tailored to your property, lifestyle, and budget.

cards.title: Night Lighting
cards.description: Custom outdoor lighting design that enhances curb appeal, adds safety, and showcases your landscape beautifully after dark. LED and low-voltage options available.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Custom outdoor kitchens, pergolas, decks, and arbors designed to extend your living space into the backyard. Perfect for entertaining family and friends.

cards.title: Irrigation Systems
cards.description: Efficient irrigation design and installation that keeps your landscape healthy and thriving year-round while conserving water and reducing your utility bills.

cards.title: Lawn Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly care including mowing, edging, blowing, mulching, pruning, seasonal flowers, fertilization, and complete insect and weed control programs.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. We visit your site, listen to your ideas, and provide an honest, no-pressure conversation about what is possible within your budget.

steps.title: Review Your 3D Design
steps.description: Our LSU-trained designer creates detailed 3D renderings so you can see your new landscape before we break ground. We refine the design until it is exactly what you want.

steps.title: Watch It Come to Life
steps.description: Our licensed crews install everything with superior craftsmanship. From first plant to final walkthrough, we stay in constant communication and stand behind every detail.

about.label: Why Louisiana Trusts Us
about.headline: Not Just Landscapers — Your Landscape Architecture Partners
about.description: Founded in 1995 by Ricky Roth, an LSU-trained Landscape Architect, Emerald Gardens has spent over 30 years transforming properties from Baton Rouge to New Orleans. We hold four professional licenses and use cutting-edge 3D design technology. But what truly sets us apart is our commitment to one-on-one relationships. Every client works directly with our team, and every project reflects your unique vision and budget.

features.title: LSU-Trained Design Expertise
features.description: Our founder brings a Landscape Architecture background from LSU, combining artistic vision with horticultural science for designs that thrive in Louisiana's climate.

features.title: Four Professional Licenses
features.description: Licensed Landscape Contractor, Horticulturist, Chemical Applicator, and General Contractor. That depth of expertise means your project is handled right from every angle.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: We maintain one-on-one client relationships because your happiness matters. If something is not right, we make it right. That has been our promise for 30+ years.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every proposal is itemized and detailed. You know exactly what you are getting and what it costs before we begin.

guarantee.headline: Our "Superior Workmanship" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any aspect of our work, we will return and make it right at no additional charge. With over 30 years of reputation on the line, we do not cut corners. Every plant, every stone, every detail is backed by our commitment to excellence. Your landscape investment is protected.

faqs.question: How does the design process work?
faqs.answer: It starts with a free onsite consultation where we discuss your vision, budget, and property. From there, we create detailed 2D and 3D renderings so you can see your landscape before installation begins. We refine the design with your feedback until it is perfect.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Gonzales, Baton Rouge, New Orleans, and communities throughout Southeast Louisiana. We have been covering this region for over 30 years, so we know the local soil, climate, and plant species inside and out.

faqs.question: Do you handle both installation and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a full-service firm. We design, install, and maintain landscapes. Many of our clients start with a design project and then continue with our weekly maintenance program to keep everything looking its best year-round.

faqs.question: What makes Emerald Gardens different from other landscapers?
faqs.answer: Our founder holds a degree in Landscape Architecture from LSU, and we carry four professional licenses. We use 3D design technology so you see your landscape before it is built. Plus, we maintain one-on-one relationships with every client rather than passing you off to a call center.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape project take?
faqs.answer: It depends on the scope. A simple planting project may take a few days, while a full outdoor living space with kitchen, lighting, and irrigation can take several weeks. We provide a clear timeline in every proposal and keep you updated throughout the process.

testimonials.name: Michael M.
testimonials.text: We've worked with Emerald Gardens for nearly a year. From the initial landscaping of our new home to weekly maintenance, these are good people. The yard is wonderful, and the management keeps its promises and backs its work. Great company.

testimonials.name: Kevin C.
testimonials.text: I have dealt with many landscaping companies in my lifetime. I can say with 100% assurance that Ricky has been by far the best. He's professional, listens, very friendly and most of all a great communicator. We hired him for 3 projects due to his outstanding service!

testimonials.name: Chris F.
testimonials.text: I have been collaborating with Ricky for several years. Not only is he very talented, he is very dependable, a great problem solver with good designs. His knowledge of horticulture is superior to most Landscape Architects I have dealt with. Highly recommended!
